audit_items.proof_trace: freeCallback calls sdsfree(val) as its sole and final operation then returns; the freed pointer is never dereferenced afterward, satisfying no_use_after_free. The dict infrastructure (dictGenericDelete, _dictClear) unlinks each entry from its bucket chain before invoking dictFreeKey, and no code path calls the keyDestructor more than once per entry, satisfying no_double_free.
